name: shell
description: Run a shell command in the workspace. Stdout + stderr + exit code are returned. Subject to the §11 sandbox: by default no network, no writes outside the workspace, no setuid. Counts against the §8 trust budget; long-lived processes hit the per-call timeout. NOT for editing files — use write_file or edit_file so edits flow through §3 atomic application.

command.description: Single shell command. Argv-style array is not supported here; if you need it, register a dedicated tool with `implementation.kind: shell`.

cwd.description: Working directory, workspace-relative or absolute. Default: workspace root.

allow_net.description: Permit outbound network for this call only. Subject to first-use approval via the §8 trust-budget UI.

stdout.description: Truncated at a harness-level cap; see `truncated`.

truncated.description: True iff stdout or stderr exceeded the cap.
